key.name: ha-url
key.description: Your server address, for example: http://192.168.1.100:8123

key.name: ha-token
key.description: The token generated from your Home Assistant profile

key.name: ignored-items
key.description: Areas or entity IDs separated by commas (for example: light.patio, Other)

key.name: discovered-areas
key.description: Internal list of areas discovered by the extension

key.name: custom-icons
key.description: JSON mapping of areas to user-selected icons

key.name: show-separator
key.description: Display a separator between native quick settings and Home Assistant controls
